data.title: Eos Energy Enterprises Reports Preliminary Q1 Revenue, Highlights Record Output and Capacity Expansion
data.description: Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOSE), a prominent US energy firm specializing in zinc-based battery energy storage systems, revealed its anticipation of reporting around $56 - $57 million in revenue for the initial quarter of 2026. The company's emphasis on record shipments and manufacturing productivity has showcased a positive trajectory in operational expansion.

data.title: Spectral AI to showcase DeepView® System at 2026 ABA Annual Meeting.
data.description: Last month, the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a year. This decline was coupled with an increase of 467,000 jobs added in sectors such as hospitality, healthcare, and professional services. The total number of unemployed persons decreased by 2.8 million to 6.9 million. Despite the positive trend, some industries like manufacturing and retail continue to struggle with low employment rates. Economists are optimistic about the future job market as businesses reopen and the economy gradually recovers from the pandemic.

data.title: Giftify’s CardCash Reports Strong Buy-Side Order Volume Growth Through Early Q1 2026, with Buy-to-Sell Ratio Reflecting Healthy Marketplace Demand
data.description: In the period leading up to March 22, CardCash saw a significant increase in buy orders processed, with a total of 112,084 orders completed. This is a notable rise from the 105,583 orders processed during the same period in the previous year. The surge in buy-side activity on the platform indicates a growing momentum as spring approaches.

data.title: NeoVolta Named 2026 “Energy Storage Company of the Year” by CleanTech Breakthrough
data.description: NeoVolta has been recognized by a prestigious global clean technology awards program for its outstanding performance in product leadership, market traction, and role in advancing energy storage adoption in the real world. This acknowledgment highlights NeoVolta's success and impact in the industry. The company's achievements have earned it a place of distinction among competitors, signifying its significant contributions to clean energy solutions. This recognition reinforces NeoVolta's position as a key player in the push for widespread adoption of energy storage technologies.

data.title: Aureus Greenway Holdings Announces $50 Million Strategic Investment in Powerus from KCGI
data.description: Funding has been secured to bolster Powerus's manufacturing capabilities in the United States and South Korea as they gear up to cater to the increasing need for locally-made autonomous defense systems. The combined entity is projected to debut on the Nasdaq stock exchange using the ticker symbol "PUSA" following the finalization of the investment.

data.title: Eagle Nuclear Energy Engages Drilling Company And Files Permit Applications For PFS-Related Drill Program at Aurora
data.description: Eagle has finalized arrangements with Harris Exploration Drilling to secure drill rigs for its upcoming PFS-related drill program. Additionally, SLR has submitted permit applications to both the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) and the Department of Geology and Mineral Industries (DOGAMI) for the drill program. The company is preparing to commence the program with these critical permits in place.

data.title: AlphaTON Market Update: GAMEE Q1 Performance Highlights 56% YoY Revenue Growth with over 88.5 million Game Plays
data.description: Update on the AlphaTON market reveals GAMEE's first-quarter performance, showcasing a remarkable 56% Year-over-Year revenue growth. The platform boasted over 88.5 million game plays during this period.

data.title: Hyperfine Receives CE and UKCA Marks for Next-Generation Swoop® System and Latest Advancement in Optive AI™ Software
data.description: A cutting-edge portable MRI technology by Hyperfine has recently obtained CE and UKCA certifications, allowing its next-gen Swoop system and latest Optive AI software to enter European markets. The certification marks signify compliance with European standards and regulations, expanding access to Hyperfine's advanced MRI technology in the region.

data.title: Stratasys Expands Offering with PolyJet J850 Core; New Software and Materials to Accelerate Industrial and Medical Additive Manufacturing
data.description: Stratasys Ltd., a leading company in the additive manufacturing industry, has announced the launch of new software features, materials, and platform upgrades. These innovations, aimed at empowering manufacturers, are designed to accelerate the shift from concept models to production parts. By enhancing design capabilities and usability, Stratasys is facilitating the transition of more parts and tools from traditional manufacturing processes to additive manufacturing workflows. This move is intended to make the production of parts and tools faster and more efficient than ever before, ultimately driving the adoption of additive manufacturing in the industry.

data.title: CURVE Sports Expands Platform with Pitch 2 Pitch, Strengthening Player Development and Club Support
data.description: CURVE Sports announced a collaboration with a prominent development organization to strengthen its operator-led platform in Maple Grove, Minnesota on April 9, 2026. This partnership aims to enhance infrastructure, data capabilities, and long-term support while maintaining the company's leadership and organizational culture. The alliance signifies a significant step towards growth, with numbers indicating improvements in various aspects of the sports sector.

data.title: Standard & Poor's Global Ratings (S&P) Affirms Ecopetrol's Stand‑Alone Credit Profile and Revises Its Global Credit Rating
data.description: Bogota, Columbia - On April 9, 2026, Ecopetrol S.A. shared an update regarding its credit rating. S&P Global Ratings revised Ecopetrol's global credit rating from BB to BB-, with a stable outlook, following a report issued on April 8, 2026. The adjustment aligns with the latest developments impacting the company. Ecopetrol's stock is traded under the tickers BVC: ECOPETROL and NYSE: EC.

data.title: Parks Associates' 30th Annual CONNECTIONS™ Conference Highlights Impact of AI Technologies on Consumer Tech Markets, May 5-7 in California
data.description: In the year 2030, it is projected that around 70 million households in the United States will be equipped with a home security system. A significant event, the 30th annual CONNECTIONS™: The Premier Connected Home Conference, will be organized by Parks Associates from May 5-7, 2026, at the Hyatt Regency Santa Clara in PLANO, Texas. This conference aims to convene a diverse range of industry experts and professionals to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the connected home sector.
